SecureMessage.title: SecureMessage
SecureMessage.description: Represents a piece of secure content or output to be displayed on a restricted page, typically visible only after successful authentication.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SecureMessage entity.

title.description: A brief title or heading for the secure message content.

content.description: The main body of the secure message or output, which can contain rich text or structured data.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the secure message was originally created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the secure message was last updated.

displayOrder.description: An integer value to define the display order of this message relative to other secure messages on the page.

SecurePageAccessLog.title: SecurePageAccessLog
SecurePageAccessLog.description: Records attempts to access the secure messaging output page, including details about the accessor and the outcome.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SecurePageAccessLog entity.

accessedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the access attempt occurred.

username.description: The username provided during the access attempt. This is primarily for logging and tracking who attempted to access the page.

accessSuccessful.description: Indicates whether the access attempt was successful (e.g., correct password provided and authenticated).

ipAddress.description: The IP address from which the access attempt originated (can be IPv4 or IPv6).

CTFWriteup.title: CTFWriteup
CTFWriteup.description: Detailed write-up for a CTF challenge, including competition info, difficulty, and exploitation steps.
